'''Hume''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and [[Spy/Legends|spy]] shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|destruction]] of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]]. After a long reconnaissance mission with [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], their [[Starship/Legends|ship]] was forced to enter [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] space in need of supplies. When [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader's]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] detected their ship, the Princess insisted they stand and fight. Unwilling to sacrifice the leader of the Rebellion, Hume knocked the princess unconscious and put her into a [[gossamer glider]]. As the glider slipped away, Hume positioned himself between it and incoming [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]]. Hume sacrificed himself, covering the princess's escape.<ref name="imp" />

==Behind the scenes==
Hume appeared in ''[[Princess Leia, Imperial Servant]]'', a [[Star Wars (comic strip)|comic strip]] written by [[Russ Helm]] and released in [[1979]]. Hume was illustrated by [[Russ Manning]].<ref name="imp" />
